tasks.summary: Completed fast-track localized transcript fix. Added identity-aware transcript message/part normalization to suppress overlapping duplicate assistant renderings across merged historical/live projections, tightened transcript spacing CSS, and added focused transcript/CSS tests. No architecture IDs touched for this localized fast-track fix.

qa.summary: Validated TASK-113 against commit 9ab292c8baa93bf425b34c04b206d13256110803. Tagged automated test coverage present for ArchitectureIDs ELM-APP-EXT-RUN-CONVERSATION-MAPPER, ELM-APP-EXT-CONVERSATION-RENDERER, and ELM-APP-EXT-CONVERSATION-LIVE-HISTORY-UX. No blocking defects found.
